description_long: This object is a handheld gaming console with a clamshell design, featuring a glossy red exterior and a dual-screen display. The upper screen displays a game title, while the lower screen is a touch-sensitive interface with physical buttons and a directional pad. A stylus is visible, partially ejected from its slot on the side, and a game cartridge is shown removed and placed in front of the device. The console's exterior is primarily composed of shiny plastic with some matte black areas around the controls. The device is compact, portable, and designed for interactive entertainment, with clear branding and game interface elements visible on the screens.
description: A glossy red handheld gaming console with dual screens, physical controls, a stylus, and a removable game cartridge. The device is compact and portable, designed for interactive play.
description_view_0: Front view showing both screens, game interface, physical controls, and the stylus partially ejected.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the console, the stylus slot, and the cartridge slot with the cartridge removed.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the shiny red exterior, camera lenses, and the game cartridge placed in front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hinge, stylus, and the edge of the lower screen and controls.
